name: Rocket Tank
notes: Fort Irongrad Tank Plant's dedicated AA heavy tank (also built at Winter Forge's Frostworks) — fills the roster's long-open anti-air gap. Cannot target Infantry at all (omitted from canTarget) — rockets are a vehicle/aircraft/ship/structure-killing tool, and this gives Infantry a hard counter-role against heavy armor rather than just a damage-modifier penalty. Big Air (2.0x) and Naval (1.6x) bonuses double as target-priority hints per the damage-modifier rule (see game-design/05-troop-stat-schema.md); penalized vs. Structure (0.7x) since rockets aren't built for sieging. Slight armor (3) reflects its plating, and each hit has a 20% chance to stun (full lockout for duration, then the global fixed -30% move/attack-speed tail — see schema's Status Effects section).
